## Testing Done

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. Which tests did you run? -->

- [ ] Ran `npm run build` — builds without errors
- [ ] Ran `npm run test` — all unit tests pass
- [ ] Ran relevant Playwright E2E specs (if UI changes): `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] Tested manually in the browser at `http://localhost:5175`

## GSSoC'26 Checklist

- [ ] I am **officially assigned** to the linked issue (I commented `/assign` and was assigned by a maintainer)
- [ ] My branch was created from `main` and is up-to-date with `upstream/main`
- [ ] I followed the branch naming convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] All my commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Every commit has a `Signed-off-by:` line (DCO — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#7-dco-sign-off-requirement))
- [ ] I have not introduced any AI-generated or copy-pasted code without proper attribution
- [ ] I have read and followed the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation alongside my code changes

## Stage 1 Automated Checks

> The following are verified automatically by GitHub Actions. Your PR must pass all of them before moving to Stage 2 (mentor review).

- PR has a non-empty description ✓
- PR includes `Closes #N` with a valid issue number ✓
- PR has a checklist ✓
- All commits have `Signed-off-by:` ✓
